top_findings.title: POST /books endpoint for creating books
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:35-43 create-book function, test/books/handler_test.clj:36-43 create-book-success test

top_findings.title: GET /books endpoint with ?author= filter support
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:45-48 list-books function, test/books/handler_test.clj:56-64 list-and-filter-books test

top_findings.title: GET /books/{id} endpoint for retrieving single book
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:50-55 get-book function, test/books/handler_test.clj:70-72 get by id test

top_findings.title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint for updating books
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:57-69 update-book function, test/books/handler_test.clj:76-81 update test

top_findings.title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint for deleting books
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:71-76 delete-book function, test/books/handler_test.clj:82-85 delete test
